name: DELUGEM120WFX

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F627DA19-962F-4A11-95FA-B5FB23CF45CB

comment:
The DELUGEM120WFX is a true outdoor fixture, crafted to defy the weather while creating a memorable and dazzling light show. The DELUGEM120WFX delivers a unique combination of wash output and stunning visual effects. This compact fixture features a powerful single 120W RGBL light engine paired with a large 140mm Fresnel lens, ensuring a beautiful, wide wash from 3.8° to 38° via its motorised zoom.
The fixture's dazzling effect comes from the surrounding 48 x 1W RGBWW Aura LEDs, which provide a dazzling eye-candy effect and intricate pixel mapping. The combination of the smooth Fresnel wash and the captivating Aura ring makes the DELUGEM120WFX an essential tool for creating impactful visuals. Control options include 5-pin DMX, ArtNet, and sACN as well as RJ45 connection capabilities, all housed in a highly portable, IP65 rated enclosure.
